imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Modern e-commerce hero banner showing shopping concept with clean geometric shapes (hero-banner.dim_1200x400.png)
- Sample product image for electronics category - smartphone (product-phone.dim_400x400.png)
- Sample product image for electronics category - laptop (product-laptop.dim_400x400.png)
- Sample product image for accessories category - headphones (product-headphones.dim_400x400.png)
- Sample product image for accessories category - smartwatch (product-watch.dim_400x400.png)
- Shopping cart icon illustration in minimalist style (cart-icon.dim_128x128.png)
- Order confirmation checkmark icon (order-success.dim_128x128.png)

existing_features.title: Create a mobile-first responsive web application with touch-optimized interface suitable for smartphones and tablets
Implement mobile-friendly navigation pattern (hamburger menu or bottom navigation bar) for primary app navigation
Design a coherent visual theme with vibrant colors, modern typography, and clean mobile-optimized layouts that provide an engaging app-like experience
Create a product catalog page displaying products with images, names, prices, and stock status in a mobile-optimized grid layout
Create product detail page showing full product information, larger image, description, and quantity selector
Implement shopping cart functionality allowing users to add products, adjust quantities, and view cart total
Build checkout flow allowing users to review cart, enter shipping information, and place orders
Create order history page displaying past orders with order details, status, and items purchased
Implement product search and category filtering to help users find products quickly
Add inventory management capability for resellers to track stock levels and receive low-stock alerts
Render generated product images as static assets in the frontend public directory

new_feature_requests.summary: Implement backend data model for products including id, name, description, price, stock quantity, category, and image reference
Create order management system in backend to store orders with customer information, ordered items, quantities, total amount, and order status
